dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Taren March is a tax witness anchored to Union Successor Heartland, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Taren March is a tax witness anchored to Union Successor Heartland, where daily institutional pressures make them useful

setting_placement.location_setting: Humans and Gnomes remain primary; Half-Elves, Elves, and Yuan-Ti are formalized as durable resident blocs in the exchange and mediation core.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Union Successor Heartland
who_depends_on_them: the continued function of Union Successor Heartland

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness. Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Taren March communicates in public.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Taren March presents as Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Taren March communicates in public.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Union Successor Heartland workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union. Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Union Successor Heartland, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of tax witness visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Union Successor Heartland, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of tax witness visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Tax Witness, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Union.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Union Successor Heartland workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for something only a grounded local can clarify, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Taren March can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Tax Witness too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of tax witness in and around Union Successor Heartland, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep Union Successor Heartland workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Union Successor Heartland, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of tax witness visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Taren March adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Union Successor Heartland learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Taren March or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Taren March as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Union Successor Heartland: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Taren March can propagate upward through The Union if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Taren March can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Taren March needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Union Successor Heartland.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Union Successor Heartland: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Tax Witness.
rumor: People say Taren March is Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
